content: The orthographic and lexical ambiguity of "reflexion" (the variant spelling of the language education term reflection) and the specialized AI agent framework Reflexion can be leveraged to improve LLM self-reflection mechanisms by grounding abstract recursive self-improvement in tangible metacognitive writing exercises designed for human learners. Human learners are taught structured reflection through explicit writing prompts in high school literacy curricula to refine their thinking, a practice that can be translated into structured, curriculum-aligned prompt sequences for LLMs to reduce unguided self-reflection drift.
